messages.content: con mas de 80 caracteres redacta en ingles, 5 ejemples de mensajes sms, para decirle a un chico que quieres que te responda el sms y que te gustaria platicar.

1. Hey, just wanted to check-in and see how you're doing. Hoping we can chat soon! 
2. Missing your messages lately, hope we can catch up soon. 
3. Thinking about you and hoping we can talk soon. 
4. Hey, did you happen to miss my message? I'm looking forward to catching up with you! 
5. Can't wait to hear back from you and have a chat! :)
mas

6. Hey there, just wondering if you got my message? Looking forward to chatting with you. 
7. It's been a while since we talked, let's catch up soon? 
8. Hope you're doing well! Would love to chat and hear about what's been going on with you. 
9. Just wanted to say hi and see if we could have a conversation sometime soon. 
10. Hey, hope everything is going good. Would love to catch up and chat when you have some free time.
ahora lo mismo pero todos de mas de 80 caracteres

10. Hey, hope everything is going good. Would love to catch up and chat when you have some free time. (90 characters)
no quiero que cuentes los caracteres, quiero que cada mensaje sea de mas de 80 caracteres.

1. I hope you're doing well! I'd love it if we could catch up soon and have a chat. 
2. Hey there, it's been a while! Let's have a fun conversation and see what's going on in each other's lives. 
3. I miss our conversations! Hoping we can find some time to talk soon and catch up. 
4. Just wanted to say hello and let you know that I'm looking forward to having a chat with you. 
5. Hey, how have you been? I would love to catch up and have a conversation about what's been going on in our lives.
que sean mas largas que 85 caracteres

1. Hi, hope you're doing great! Just wanted to check in and see if we could schedule some time to catch up soon. I'd love to hear what you've been up to lately and share some of my own news as well. 
2. Hey, it's been too long! I hope you're doing well and I really miss our conversations. Would be great to arrange a time to chat and catch up on everything that's been happening in our lives. 
3. Hi there, just wanted to drop a message and see if you'd be interested in talking soon. It's been too long and I'd love to reconnect and find out what's new with you. Let me know if that works for you! 
4. Hey, how's life treating you? I've been thinking about you and could really use a fun conversation. Let me know if you're free to chat soon, it would be great to catch up and talk about all kinds of stuff. 
5. Hi, hope this message finds you well! I was just wondering if we could plan some time to have a chat and see how things are going. I always love talking with you and would welcome the chance to hear about what's been happening in your life lately.
dame 10 mas

1. Hey, how have you been? I miss our conversations and thought it would be great to catch up sometime soon. Would you be interested in finding some time to chat? 
2. Hi there, hope your day is going well! I'd love the chance to chat with you and discuss what's been happening since we last talked. Let me know if you're free sometime soon. 
3. Hey, long time no speak! I'm curious to hear what you've been up to these days. Could we plan to have a conversation some time soon? 
4. Hi, wanted to drop by and say hello! I have some exciting updates to share with you and would love to hear what's been happening in your world. Let's set a time to catch up? 
5. Hello there! I've been meaning to check in with you and see how everything is going. Would it be possible to schedule a quick chat soon and reconnect? 
6. Hey, hope you're having a great day! It's been ages since we've chatted and I'd really love the chance to talk with you again soon. Are you free to catch up sometime this week? 
7. Hi, hope this message finds you well. I was just thinking about you and wanted to suggest that we catch up soon. Maybe we could share some laughs and catch up on life? 
8. Hey there, long time no talk! I'd love the opportunity to chat and catch up with you. Is there a convenient time where we could make that happen? 
9. Hi, how's everything with you? It's been a while since we've chatted and I've missed our conversations. Are you free to catch up sometime soon? 
10. Hey, hope you're doing well! I've been feeling the need to connect with some good friends and thought of you. Would love to set aside some time to have a meaningful conversation with you.
mas

9. Hey, hope this message finds you well! Would be great to have a chat with you and catch up on things since we last talked. Are you available sometime soon? 
10. Hi there, just popping in to say hello! Would love to catch up with you sometime soon over coffee or online. Hoping to hear back from you soon.
